title: xysmalobium involucratum
intro: Xysmalobium involucratum, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is commonly known as the "Stiff-stemmed Yellow Gentian" due to its yellow flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in South Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Xysmalobium involucratum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or by using them in a tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
